name: deliberation-room
description: Multi-agent deliberation system for biblical commentary analysis

scripts.dev-model-haiku: bun run dev:css & PARTICIPANT_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5 MANAGER_MODEL=claude-haiku-4-5 bun run dev:server
scripts.dev-model-default: bun run dev:css & bun run dev:server
scripts.test:e2e: bun run tests/e2e/landing-page.test.ts && bun run tests/e2e/conversation.test.ts && bun run tests/e2e/integration.test.ts
